title: Python: interface/__init__.py deprecation warning removed but module still deprecated
description:
In python/src/lichen/interface/__init__.py, the deprecation warning on import was removed:

    # Removed:
    # if not os.environ.get('LICHEN_LEGACY_CBOR'):
    #     warnings.warn(...)

The docstring says 'Deprecation warnings are emitted when deprecated functions are called, not on import' but no code was added to emit warnings from the individual functions.

Location: python/src/lichen/interface/__init__.py
Risk: Users won't be warned about deprecated module usage.
Fix: Either add @deprecated decorators to the exported functions, or restore the import warning.
close_reason: Restored deprecation warning on import in lichen/interface/__init__.py
